templates.name: Product Feature Post
templates.prompt_instructions: Write a concise post using: Hook, Problem, Feature, Benefit, CTA.
templates.example_output: Still spending too much time planning meals? Washoku helps you log one real meal in seconds. Track patterns without guilt. Try it today.

templates.name: Founder Story Post
templates.prompt_instructions: Use: personal context, problem observed, why we built this, what we learned, CTA.
templates.example_output: We noticed many people quit habit apps when they miss a day. We built Washoku to support consistency over perfection...

templates.name: Lifestyle Tip Post
templates.prompt_instructions: Use: gentle tip, why it helps, one small action, CTA.
templates.example_output: Try a 10-minute walk after dinner tonight. It helps digestion and gives your day a clean finish. Small actions count.

templates.name: Launch Announcement
templates.prompt_instructions: Use: what launched, who it helps, why it matters, CTA link.
templates.example_output: Washoku v1.2 is live. Better habit logging, clearer trend snapshots, and a calmer daily flow.

templates.name: Short Video Script
templates.prompt_instructions: Use: opening hook, 3 quick points, visual notes, on-screen text, CTA.
templates.example_output: Hook: You do not need perfect meals to make progress...
